_doc: Canonical alias → Telegram routing registry. Edited by hand or by the dashboard's POST /api/telegram/topics/:alias endpoint. Never put bot tokens or session secrets here — only routing facts.

topics.name: General / default
topics.reRegisterHints: Topic 1 = the always-existing General thread. Nothing to register.

topics.name: News Dashboard
topics.purpose: Daily morning news digest + dashboard alerts.
topics.reRegisterHints: If news messages stop landing in the topic, send any message in the News topic and re-run topic discovery (POST /api/telegram/topics/news/probe).

topics.name: Organizer V2
topics.purpose: Computer / Gmail / Photos cleanup status, scan reports, approval prompts.
topics.reRegisterHints: If organizer messages stop landing in the topic, send any message in the Organizer topic and re-run topic discovery.

topics.name: System Map
topics.purpose: Inventory snapshots, todo backlog, recommended-next-work pings.
topics.reRegisterHints: If system-map pings stop landing in the topic, send any message in the System Map topic and re-run topic discovery.

topics.name: Traffic-Law-Appeal-IL
topics.purpose: Sensitive legal-work context for the Traffic-Law-Appeal-IL agent. Status pings only — no drafts/tickets unless explicitly requested.
topics.reRegisterHints: 1) In Telegram, create a new TOPIC inside the OpenClaw supergroup, named exactly: 'תעבורה / Traffic Law'. 2) Send any one message inside that topic. 3) Open the dashboard's Telegram / Topics panel and click 'PROBE' on the traffic-law row, OR POST to /api/telegram/topics/traffic-law with { topicId: <numericId> }. 4) Until then, status pings fall back to DM (deliveryDmId) — and only when explicitly requested.

topics.name: Unknown topic 537
topics.purpose: Observed in the supergroup but not yet labeled. Hold for identification.
topics.reRegisterHints: Open the topic in Telegram, copy its title, then POST /api/telegram/topics/unknown-537 with { humanTopicName: '<title>', alias: '<new-alias>' } to relabel. Until then, no automatic sends.

topics.name: Unknown topic 967
topics.purpose: Observed in the supergroup but not yet labeled. Hold for identification.
topics.reRegisterHints: Open the topic in Telegram, copy its title, then POST /api/telegram/topics/unknown-967 with { humanTopicName: '<title>', alias: '<new-alias>' } to relabel. Until then, no automatic sends.

topics.name: Owner DM
topics.purpose: Direct message to the owner. Fallback target when a topic is sensitive or pending.
topics.reRegisterHints: DM to ownerDmId. Always reachable as long as the gateway is healthy.
